subject: Peeking Red Card — item card depicting a stylized red card or tile with a target or crosshair design, suspended in an electric blue energy field
description: The card art shows a red rectangular card or tile bearing a circular target-like design, floating within a vivid blue electric energy field. The background is dark blue with arc-like lightning or energy lines radiating outward. The red card itself is the visual focal point — bold and stark against the cool energetic background. The composition has a charged, tense quality, consistent with the card's hand-disruption mechanic.
foreground: red rectangular card with circular target design, suspended in blue electric energy
background: dark blue with radiating arc energy lines
